diagnosis: Sensitive gaps are sufficiently clarified for review.

updated_data_ai_privacy.personal_or_health_data: The pilot uses administrative intake data and patient-provided symptom descriptions.
updated_data_ai_privacy.data_sources: Data comes from patient intake forms and staff-entered triage notes; imaging and lab data are out of scope.
updated_data_ai_privacy.ai_system_role: The AI drafts a structured intake summary that staff review before any workflow action.
updated_data_ai_privacy.validation_evidence: The team has sample intake cases and will compare draft summaries against staff-written summaries.
updated_data_ai_privacy.privacy_governance: The hospital data protection and clinical governance teams review data use before pilot activation.
updated_data_ai_privacy.cybersecurity_controls: Access is limited to pilot staff, with traceable user sessions and no external data sharing.
updated_data_ai_privacy.regulatory_context: GDPR, EHDS, EU AI Act, MDR, Cybersecurity Act and HTAR relevance remains contextual and review-bound.
updated_data_ai_privacy.human_review_plan: Data protection, clinical governance, cybersecurity and regulatory owners review the pilot before use.
assumptions: The pilot stays on internal systems.
Staff review every AI-generated handoff before action.
uncertainties: Exact governance sign-off path remains to be confirmed.

completion_reason: data AI privacy gaps sufficiently clarified for human review
